formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

fields.name: Actuals_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Actuals for {!rcdActual.Actuals_Month__c}

{!rcdActual.Funding_Award__r.Name}

{!rcdActual.Parent_Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!rcdActual.Parent_Deadline_Date__c}

All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Grant_Capital_Spend_ACT
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_Ancillary_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Co_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_Admin_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.
Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_Grant_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH
fields.fieldText: Total Grant Funding Toward on-gas LCH
fields.helpText: Please include these costs in the Grant capital spend field

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding Toward on-gas LCH Offer
fields.helpText: Please do not include these costs in the Co-funding capital spend fields

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Homes_Treated_Display
fields.fieldText:
Total Homes To Be Upgraded (from Baseline)

{!rcdActual.Parent_Baseline__r.Total_Homes_to_be_Upgraded__c}


  • All KPIs must total no more than the displayed “Total Homes to be Upgraded (from baseline)” figure.
  • If a home meets both KPI 1 and KPI 2 within the same month, record it only under KPI 2 to reflect its current status for that month.

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.
Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure_Required
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes With All Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.
Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: KPI_No_of_Homes_Identified_Suitable_for_Retrofit
fields.fieldText: KPI No.of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit

fields.name: KPI_No_of_Homes_Ready_For_Installs_To_Start
fields.fieldText: KPI No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start

fields.name: KPI_No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure
fields.fieldText: KPI No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

fields.name: KPI_No_of_Homes_With_All_Installations_Completed
fields.fieldText: KPI No. of Homes With All Installations Completed

fields.name: ACT_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter the number of homes to EPC C this month for this scheme

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Enter the Energy Savings (kWh) this month for this scheme

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

textTemplates.name: txt_Date_Clarification_Message
textTemplates.text: Please enter non-cumulative data only to represent progress made in this month only

textTemplates.name: txt_Resubmission_Text
textTemplates.text:
Please adjust and resubmit your report for the following reasons:

{!rcdUpdate.Resubmission_Request_Details__c}
